description: Generator ownership rules. generatorOwnedPaths = AI generates via recipes. manualPaths = AI may restructure with CUSTOM sections. fullyProtected = never touch without human approval.

rules.generatorOwnedPaths: Fully generated from YAML. AI must NOT edit directly — only edit YAML and run recipe.
rules.restructurablePaths: AI may regenerate these via recipes. Must preserve existing logic in CUSTOM sections. Must NOT just add @generated headers — run actual recipe.
